+ back to UGC Video Creator Workflow
UGC Video Creator Workflow

Step 10 — Voice Over Generation

The best delivery comes from a real voice. Record your script's voiceover yourself, or have someone comfortable on camera do it. Then go to ElevenLabs, use the voice changer feature, and pick an Indian-accent voice that suits your character. Generate with the standard settings first; hover over each setting to see what it does.

ElevenLabs uses the shared team Glamrs login.

← Previous step Next step →
